content.en:
Heavenly Fire Sect.

The Burning Sun Heavenly Monarch took out the teleportator, and an illusory image appeared, and it was the Black Tower Heavenly Monarch.

"Black Tower Heavenly Monarch, our Heavenly Fire Sect's Golong Heavenly Monarch has fallen, presumably the enemy has made a move, what is the situation now, have you captured the enemy?" asked the Burning Sun Heavenly Monarch.

"The mission has failed!" "The Black Tower Heavenly Monarch said: "The person who did it is the son of ten thousand laws, and we can't kill it!"

"What, is it the Ten Thousand Laws?"

The Burning Sun Heavenly Monarch was surprised.

Judging from the previous speculation, it shouldn't be the way of ten thousand laws!

That mysterious enemy will obviously have a Chaos Divine Power and a Piercing Yang Sword, and at least a Chaos Divine Power that can detect and a Hidden Chaos Divine Power.

A Heavenly Monarch can only practice one or two Chaos Divine Powers at most, and it is extremely rare for a Heavenly Monarch to know three Chaotic Divine Powers, and the Chaotic Divine Powers that Ye Tian exposed before are not these at all.

Therefore, they have not thought about Wanfa Daozi.

Moreover, they had always thought that the Ten Thousand Law Dao Ziye Tian's life-saving methods were powerful, but in fact their strength was not strong, and the strength of that mysterious enemy was second only to the Heavenly Monarch List.

Can Wanfa Daozi have that strength?

"It is indeed the Ten Thousand Laws Daozi, although even our Dark God Society is very reluctant to believe in this matter, but I have to say that the talent of the Ten Thousand Laws Daozi is too strong, I am afraid that he has cultivated many Chaos Divine Powers, and his strength is infinitely close to the combat power of the Heavenly Monarch List!"

Black Tower Heavenly Monarch Road.

"Wanfa Daozi, why did he make a move on our Heavenly Fire Sect? Could it be that the last time we attacked him was exposed? Impossible, we concealed our identity and changed our soul aura, he may not know about it!" Burning Sun Heavenly Monarch said in a trance.

"We don't know about this!"

The Black Tower Heavenly Monarch shook his head.

Subsequently, the Black Tower Heavenly Monarch cut off the summons.

The White Eagle Heavenly Monarch on the side asked: "Lieyang, what should I do now, Wanfa Daozi must have known about our assassination of him, if the Void Heaven One Vein intervenes, the problem will be even more serious!"

"Hmph, the Void Heaven Pulse still dares to trouble us? Wanfa Daozi has assassinated so many of our Heavenly Monarchs and Divine Generals, so it's right for us to find trouble with him! Spread the news, just say that Wanfa Daozi assassinated many Heavenly Monarchs of our Tianhuo Sect, let the Void Heaven Pulse give us an explanation, otherwise our Tianhuo Sect will never give up!"

"Then that's the only way to do it first!"

The White Eagle Heavenly Monarch nodded.

-------------

Soon, a piece of news spread across the universe.

Ten Thousand Law Daozi assassinated the Heavenly Monarch of the Heavenly Fire Sect, and the Void Heaven One Pulse must give the Heavenly Fire Sect an explanation.

Void Heaven Temple.

Ye Tian also knew about the rumors from the outside world, so he asked the Void Heaven Temple to help spread the news that the Heavenly Fire Sect and the Dark God would collude to assassinate him, and he took revenge.

The news also spread quickly.

Seeing that this big secret had been exposed, the Burning Sun Heavenly Monarch and the White Eagle Heavenly Monarch were immediately very panicked, but they quickly calmed down again, saying that this was the Ten Thousand Laws Daozi deliberately planting the Heavenly Fire Sect.

As the rumors grew, no one knew who to believe.

This matter has come to an end, but the reputation of the Heavenly Fire Sect is completely stinky.

Although the news of the collusion between the Heavenly Fire Sect and the Dark God Society was not believed by anyone, people thought that the Heavenly Fire Sect would spend the price to ask the Dark God Society to assassinate the Ten Thousand Law Daozi, which was not a big deal.

But the Tianhuo Sect attacked the Wanfa Daozi, and this matter was basically a real hammer, otherwise why would the Wanfa Daozi assassinate the Heavenly Monarch of the Tianfa Sect.

The major forces are not stupid, so naturally they will not believe some of the statements of the Heavenly Fire Sect.

If the Heavenly Fire Sect kills the Ten Thousand Laws Daozi, the major forces may be happy.

But now, the Tianhuo Sect was assassinated instead of succeeding, losing face, losing power, and losing its reputation, which can be described as a heavy loss.

However, Ye Tian's reputation is getting louder and louder, and it is a real sensation in the Great Universe, and even some True Ancestors outside the Great Universe have attached importance to Ye Tian, at least making many powerful beings notice Ye Tian's existence.

But Ye Tian kept a low profile at this time, and retreated and cultivated in the Void Heaven Palace.

In the blink of an eye, 100,000 years have passed.

"The gold-devouring supernatural power has finally become a small realm!"

Ye Tian's face was happy and quite excited.

The Gold Devouring Divine Power is a Chaos Divine Power that Ye Tian has cultivated a long time ago, and it was also traded from the Yun Zi Divine Maiden, ranking 121st among the three thousand Chaos Divine Powers, which is very good, but it consumes more resources.

For so many years, he had been secretly collecting all kinds of rare ores and metals, and finally cultivated this chaotic divine power to the realm of Xiaocheng.

The gold-devouring divine power can be turned into armor to protect the whole body, and it can also form a blade as his own weapon, for example, now Ye Tian doesn't need a weapon at all, and he can completely use the gold-devouring divine power to turn into a high-grade Chaos Supreme Treasure long knife.

Moreover, the Gold Devouring Divine Power can be combined with the Blood River Immortal Technique, the Great Immortal Technique, the Gu Yuan Imperial Body Divine Power and other defensive divine powers, so that their own defense ability skyrockets.

It can be said that Ye Tian's life-saving ability has reached another level.

"It's a pity that there is still a lack of a powerful offensive type Chaos Divine Power!"

Ye Tian sighed.

In order to save points, he used to buy relatively ordinary Chaos Divine Powers, which were basically at the end of the three thousand Chaos Divine Powers, and even some Chaos Divine Powers were not qualified to join the ranks of the Three Thousand Chaos Divine Powers.

Some truly powerful attack-type Chaos Divine Powers, he hasn't cultivated any of them so far.

Moreover, the cultivation conditions for those truly powerful offensive chaotic supernatural powers were very harsh, and very few people in the Void Heaven Pulse could practice them, so there was no way to create a supernatural inheritance.

Therefore, this subsystem of the Void Heaven One Vein did not have such a chaotic supernatural power inheritance, and Ye Tian had no way to learn it.

The Void Heaven One Vein Headquarters in the Chaos must have that kind of Chaos Divine Power inheritance, but there is definitely no way to get it for a while.

"Let's improve the other aspects first, when the strength is strong, you will have a chance to get those truly terrifying chaos supernatural powers!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Not long after, Ye Tian entered the Heavenly Monarch List.

This incident caused the shock of all the forces, because Ye Tian's time to enter the Heavenly Monarch List was too short, and it was really incredible to increase his strength so quickly.

And many of the gods and generals who competed with Ye Tian in the god general list are still god generals, and their strength has not improved much, such as Yun Zi Divine Maiden, who once suppressed Ye Tian, but is still in the late stage of the eight-star god general's combat power, and even the eight-star peak god general has not stepped in, but Ye Tian is already the heavenly monarch of the heavenly monarch list.

The gap between the two has risen to a world apart!

After entering the Heavenly Monarch List, Ye Tian felt a stronger increase in cultivation than before, and his cultivation speed was faster than before.

Nowadays, Ye Tian is not short of resources,

After all, he had killed so many Heavenly Monarchs of the Heavenly Fire Sect, and he had gained a lot of resources, and there were many Chaos Treasures alone.

With the passage of time, Ye Tian's Xuanxuan Technique gradually improved to the eighth layer of the consummation realm, and the Chaos Divine Power of one door was promoted to the Xiaocheng realm, but it was difficult to ascend to the Dacheng realm.

As for cultivation, with Ye Tian's unremitting efforts, he finally reached the peak realm of the Heavenly Mandate Realm.

And at this point, Ye Tian's cultivation could not be improved for the time being.

If you want to improve your cultivation, the next step is the half-step True Spirit Realm.

Ye Tian was not in a hurry, his accumulation in the Heavenly Monarch Realm was far from enough, so naturally he would not impact the True Spirit Realm.

"No. 791 on the Heavenly Monarch List, my current strength is enough, Tianhuo Sect, our accounts can continue to be calculated!"

Ye Tian said coldly.
